turns.content:
Here's a summary of the 5-company competitor analysis!

## PixelForge vs 5 Competitors

| Company | Strengths | Weaknesses | vs PixelForge |
|---------|-----------|------------|---------------|
| **Figma** | Industry-leading collaboration | Weak AI features | PixelForge differentiates with AI |
| **Canva** | Massive template library | Limited customization | PixelForge wins with AI custom generation |
| **Adobe Express** | Adobe ecosystem integration | Limited as standalone | PixelForge has a more flexible API-first design |
| **Designs.ai** | AI-focused but outdated UI | High pricing | PixelForge is 1/3 the price |
| **Looka** | Specialized in brand design | Weak for general design | PixelForge covers general + AI broadly |

## Top 3 Differentiators
1. **Real-time AI custom generation** — Not available in Figma/Canva
2. **API-first design** — Developer-friendly
3. **Low price point** — 1/3 of Designs.ai

The detailed 650-line HTML report is available for reference. The CEO has already received the executive summary (one-page version).
